zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice de Savoie於1223年3月4日出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利時，她的父親Amadeus IV Count of Savoy26歲，母親Mathilde de Bourgogne31歲。她和Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen至少有1個女兒。她去世於1259年5月10日在義大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice de Savoie于1223年3月4日出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利时，她的父亲Amadeus IV Count of Savoy26岁，母亲Mathilde de Bourgogne31岁。她和Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen至少有1个女儿。她去世于1259年5月10日在意大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Savoie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Marcel, Damien, Jacques, Normand, Raoul, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Julien, Alcee.
French: habitational name from Savoy (French name Savoie), a region in the southeastern part of France, or from (La) Savoie, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Savoy .

History: Savoy was consolidated in the 11th century by count Humbert the White-Handed (Humbert aux blanches-mains). He was the founder of the great European noble house of Savoy, with large holdings of territory in France, Switzerland, and present-day Italy.

variants.name: Savoy
meanings: Altered form of French   Savoie  . It is also found in England, as an Anglicized surname of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Savoia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Salvatore, Antonio, Dante, Enzo, Franco, Italo, Piero, Reno, Umberto, Vito.
Italian: habitational name from Savoy, in France, named Savoia in Italian. See Savoie .

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice de Savoie was born on 4 March 1223, in Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Amadeus IV Count of Savoy, was 26 and her mother, Mathilde de Bourgogne, was 31. She had at least 1 daughter with Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen. She died on 10 May 1259, in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice de Savoie est née le 4 mars 1223, à Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Amadeus IV Count of Savoy, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Bourgogne, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen. Elle est décédée le 10 mai 1259, à Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice de Savoie am 4. März 1223 in Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Amadeus IV Count of Savoy 26 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Bourgogne 31. Sie hatte mit Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. Mai 1259 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Savoie è nata il il 4 marzo 1223 nel Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Amadeus IV Count of Savoy, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mathilde de Bourgogne, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen. Morì il 10 maggio 1259, nel Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Savoieが1223年3月4日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスサボイチャンブeリーで生まれた時，父Amadeus IV Count of Savoyは26歳，母Mathilde de Bourgogneは31歳であった。彼女はRe di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufenとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1259年5月10日にイタリアピエモントクウネオサルズゾで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Savoie(이)가 1223년 3월 4일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 서아보이 챔브e리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Amadeus IV Count of Savoy(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Bourgogne(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1259년 5월 10일 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 살루즈오에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.4 March 1223–10 May 1259: 1223 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 4–1259 оны Тавдугаар сарын 10

pt.4 March 1223–10 May 1259: 4 de março de 1223–10 de maio de 1259
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Savoie nasceu em 4 de março de 1223, em Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Amadeus IV Count of Savoy, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Bourgogne, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen. Ela faleceu em 10 de maio de 1259, em Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice de Savoie родилась 4 марта 1223 г. в местности чамбeри, савои, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Amadeus IV Count of Savoy было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Bourgogne, 31. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen. Она умерла 10 мая 1259 г. в местности салуззо, кунео, пиемонт, Италия в возрасте 36 лет.

es.4 March 1223–10 May 1259: 4 de marzo de 1223–10 de mayo de 1259
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice de Savoie nació el 4 de marzo de 1223, en Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Amadeus IV Count of Savoy, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Bourgogne, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1259, en Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, a la edad de 36 años.
